headline: Jim Cramer on LyondellBasell: “I Think It’s Going to Bounce Back”
summary: LyondellBasell Industries N.V. (NYSE:LYB) was among the stocks Jim Cramer discussed during Mad Money, as he called the growing wave of stock offerings and debt issuance a threat to the bull market. Toward the end of the lightning round, answering a caller’s query about the stock, Cramer said: Okay, I think it’s going to bounce […]
